label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out how many ways I can arrange 5 identical gold coins and 3 identical silver coins in a row, but with the condition that no two silver coins are adjacent. Let me think about how to approach this. First, since the coins are identical, the problem is about permutations with restrictions. The main constraint here is that no two silver coins can be next to each other. That means when I place the silver coins, they have to be separated by at least one gold coin.
